notes: Quality-conservative MiniMax M2.7 AutoRound TP4 run after verifying Q/K RMS variance is all-reduced across tensor-parallel ranks. Local weights are Lasimeri/MiniMax-M2.7-int4-AutoRound submitted under base MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.7 for consistency with earlier accepted runs. 4x Intel Arc Pro B70, XPU/Level Zero, local vLLM INC/XPU WNA16 patch, llm-scaler unsigned INT4 MoE decode path, B70 E=256,N=384 MoE config, FP16 activations, max_model_len=2048. A previous 41.13 tok/s AOT artifact is now treated as suspect because its graph did not show the Q/K variance all-reduce. No speculative decode, no expert dropping, no power-limit changes.

engineFlags.commandSnippet: USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE=1 CCL_TOPO_P2P_ACCESS=1 VLLM_XPU_ENABLE_XPU_GRAPH=0 vllm bench throughput --backend vllm --model /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --tokenizer /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --trust-remote-code --dtype float16 --tensor-parallel-size 4 --distributed-executor-backend mp --max-model-len 2048 --max-num-batched-tokens 1024 --max-num-seqs 1 --dataset-name random --random-input-len 512 --random-output-len 1536 --random-range-ratio 0 --num-prompts 1 --disable-log-stats
engineFlags.extraFlags: XPU/Level Zero, B70 tuned MoE config E=256,N=384,dtype=int4_w4a16, llm-scaler u4 MoE decode path for x.shape<=4, Q/K RMS variance tensor_model_parallel_all_reduce enabled, XPU graph disabled, CCL_ATL_TRANSPORT=ofi, CCL_TOPO_P2P_ACCESS=1, no power-limit change
